ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_chart" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "superfit_size" TEXT /* Superfit size (e.g., EarthFit, WaterFit) */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size (e.g., L, XL, 2X) */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurements (e.g., 12-14) */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurements (e.g., 39-42) */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurements (e.g., 32-35, 43-46) */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurements (e.g., 30-32) */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurements (e.g., 24-26) */,
  "neck_size" TEXT /* Neck size measurements (e.g., 14-16) */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the product_category table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Product name */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Product description */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the product_category table */,
  "price" TEXT /* Product price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Customer name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer email */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customer table */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Order date */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_item" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the order table */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the product table */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size for the product based on customer measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_category" (
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "product_category_name" TEXT /* Product category name */,
  "product_category_description" TEXT /* Product category description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the product table */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Warehouse location of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the order table */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Shipping cost */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id")
)
